summary: Platform Hardening Production Activation (Iteration 73) - Full testing of 10-part production activation engine with REAL infrastructure checks. All 35 backend tests passed. All 7 new frontend tabs verified working with live data.

issues: Collection names and text slightly hard to read on dark cards - consider lighter text

critical_code_review_comments: Production Activation engine returns REAL data from Redis, MongoDB, and Celery - not mocked
Go-Live Certification properly calculates weighted scores across 5 dimensions (infrastructure 25%, security 25%, reliability 20%, observability 15%, operations 15%)
Risk Analysis correctly identifies 2 issues: weak secrets and no Celery workers
Dry Run pipeline tests all 5 steps with sub-millisecond latency
Tenant isolation audit covers 20 collections with proper risk classification
seed_data_creation: None - activation endpoints return real infrastructure data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production Activation fully tested. 11 new activation endpoints verified: GET /api/hardening/activation/infrastructure (Redis healthy, MongoDB healthy, Celery no_workers as expected), GET /api/hardening/activation/secrets (secret audit with risk levels), GET /api/hardening/activation/suppliers (3 suppliers, 2 active), GET /api/hardening/activation/performance (100% SLA pass rate - MongoDB and Redis latency tests), POST /api/hardening/activation/incident/{type} (3 types - supplier_outage, queue_backlog, payment_failure - all return playbook steps), GET /api/hardening/activation/tenant-isolation (20 collections, 5% isolation score due to missing tenant fields), GET /api/hardening/activation/dry-run (5/5 pipeline steps PASS), GET /api/hardening/activation/onboarding (80% readiness - 4/5 checks pass), GET /api/hardening/activation/certification (NO-GO decision, 6.2/10 score, gap of 2.3 to target 8.5). Frontend has 7 new tabs: Go-Live (default - shows certification), Infrastructure (Redis/Celery/MongoDB health), Performance (SLA pass rate), Incidents (3 simulation buttons), Isolation (collection audit), Dry Run (5 pipeline steps), Onboarding (5 readiness checks).

features_verified.POST_activation_incident_payment_failure: PASS - Returns Stripe webhook failure playbook
